_comment_runtimeSupplementalPackages: Supplemental runtime dependencies must stay pinned to exact package specs.
_comment_runtimeSupplementalPackageExcep: Every unstable or prerelease supplemental dependency must declare an explicit exception with rationale and review date. Remove the exception once a stable semver is available.

runtimeSupplementalPackageExceptions.reason: Upstream has not published a stable semver release yet, but the bundled runtime still requires this supplemental package.
